meta.title: Call or Fold
meta.description: Compare pot odds to hand odds and decide.

blocks.content:
## Call or Fold?

Now combine everything: count your outs, estimate your probability, calculate pot odds, and decide. If your chance of winning is better than the price you're paying — call. Otherwise, fold. Practice making these decisions quickly and confidently!

blocks.title: Call or Fold
blocks.instructions: Use the Rule of 2 (outs x 2 for one card to come) and pot odds to decide whether to call or fold.
